subject: Cloud Computing
title: FinOps: Making Cloud Costs Visible
description: One-minute skill: FinOps: Making Cloud Costs Visible.

hook.text: Cloud bills are out of control. FinOps brings finance, engineering, and business together to manage cloud spending.

buildup.text: Engineers choose resources, finance pays the bill, and nobody has shared visibility. FinOps fixes this disconnect.

discovery.text: FinOps tools show exactly which team, project, and feature costs what. Cost becomes a metric, just like performance.

twist.text: The FinOps Foundation reports most companies waste 30% of cloud spend. Visibility alone can cut costs dramatically.

climax.text: FinOps is now a career path. The FinOps Foundation certifies practitioners and publishes cloud cost best practices.

punchline.text: 30% of cloud spending is waste. FinOps makes it visible to cut it.

quiz.question: What fundamental problem does FinOps address?
options: The disconnect between engineering resource choices and financial accountability
The need to eliminate all cloud spending
The requirement for engineers to learn accounting
